creator: llevier@argosnet.com
text:
Hi Edwin,

That's fine to me.

Thanks

Brgrds

At 00:50 15/04/2011, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Maintainer of security/hydra,
>
>Please note that PR ports/156411 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/156411
>
>--
>Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
